name: handoff
description: Hand off interactive build/review tasks to Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, opencode, or Cursor, plus a strict versioned machine API for hardened Codex, Grok, and Kiro pipeline runs. Prompt bytes stay off argv and every machine result fails closed with Git evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate build & review to Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, opencode, or Cursor
interface.longDescription: Hand off one bounded interactive build or review to another one-shot coding agent, or invoke the strict v0.2 machine ABI for hardened Codex, Grok, and Kiro runs. Prompt bytes stay off argv, machine roles use fixed fail-closed policy, and normalized results carry deterministic before/after Git evidence rather than trusting an agent self-report.
defaultPrompt: Have Codex review the diff in src/auth
Let Grok build the parser in src/parse.ts
Have Claude review this module, read-only
